summary: 0.6.52 restores movie joystick scrub to discrete 15-second skip behavior after live testing showed the analog-rate path was only moving about a second per scrub action.
operatorSignals: The historical logs correctly recorded that 15 seconds was the intended scrub amount.
Fresh live testing on a paused movie showed roughly 8 seconds after 10 joystick scrubs, proving the current behavior was a real bug rather than perception.
actionsTaken: Rechecked the 0.6.42 and 0.6.43 logs to confirm the intended 15-second behavior.
Compared the current CUA input seam against the historical scrub change and verified the analog-rate path was still in place.
Replaced that movie stick path with the existing discrete 15-second skip transport on a fresh version boundary.
nonGoals: No slideshow work in this slice.
No right-stick volume, gaze, or scene-builder changes in this slice.
